linux-gfx1100.blocked_reason: External community port: colmap ROCm support is upstream PR #4420 (author iShengnan; jeff contributed, not author). Tracked for reference (the 'colmap model' / Strategy A); one upstream PR covers ROCm, not separately validated per-arch in MOAT. Follow-up jeffdaily/colmap:rocm-sift-gpu adds SIFT GPU.
